checks.detail: must attest execution of actual @cloudflare/kumo@2.5.2 imports over served HTTP
package, source, CSS, executable, and browser product hashes are mandatory
journeys must name trusted CDP Input actions
tracer source must not contain data-url
tracer source must not contain fixture-markup
tracer source must not contain dispatch-event
tracer source must not contain inline-markup
IR must bind accepted tracer and frontend result bytes
every score must equal a recorded measured check
lowerers may not branch on component IDs
verifier must require lowerer provenance and must not accept copied canonical traces

failures: ir-artifact-bindings: IR must bind accepted tracer and frontend result bytes
ir-measured-scores: every score must equal a recorded measured check
generic-lowerers: lowerers may not branch on component IDs
verifier-generated-origin: verifier must require lowerer provenance and must not accept copied canonical traces
